subcodes.first_line: Verily, the springtime of remembrance and utterance hath come, yet most of the people comprehend not, having cast behind their backs the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی ربیع الذکر و البیان و الناس اکثرهم لایفقهون نبذوا امر الله عن ورائهم
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @exhortations and counsels
